description_long: This house features a low, wide profile with a prominent, dark hip roof and a large covered front porch. The exterior walls are a mix of dark stone and neutral siding, giving it a modern yet earthy appearance. Large, blue-tinted windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living areas. The house sits on a spacious, paved lot with a few vertical structures or posts on one side and some flat objects or panels near the front. The roof extends over the entryway, providing shelter and architectural interest, while the overall structure is single-story and horizontally oriented. The design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark hip roof, large blue windows, and a mix of stone and neutral siding, set on a wide paved lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with large blue windows, covered porch, and the broad hip roof.
description_view_1: View highlighting the front entry, porch, and additional flat objects or panels on the left side of the lot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with fewer windows and a continuation of the hip roof design.
description_view_3: Side view showing the solid wall with minimal windows and three vertical posts or columns on the lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with large glass doors, overhanging roof, and minimal decorative elements
